text_excerpt: Contact | Ben Obese-Jecty MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Ben News My Plan for Huntingdon Articles & Media Campaigns Contact Newsletter Privacy Notice Contact Tweet By email: [email protected] By phone: 0207 219 7338 If you are a constituent you will be given priority but please check that you have included your full name and postal address in your message as we are unable to progress your correspondence without this information. Please note that my office operates a Zero Tolerance Policy . Contacting Your Local Authority If your concern relates to any of the public services listed below, you should contact your local council in the first instance. Adult & Family Learning Benefits Council Tax Collection Environmental Health Highways Housing Leisure Facilities Licensing Museums & Libraries Planning Permission & Disputes Refuse Collection Refuse & Waste Disposal Sites Schools Social Services Strategic Planning Matters Street Cleaning Town Planning Our local authorities are Huntingdonshire District Council , Cambridgeshire County Council , and Cambridgeshire and Peterborough Combined Authority .
